locations.json.notes: Single source of truth for all 108 location pages. Add new locations here — build.py generates pages automatically.

build_pipeline.single_site_build_command: cd /home/chubert/omni-builder && python3 -c "from engine.build_sites import build_single_site; build_single_site('sites/site_NV')"
build_pipeline.notes: Engine does plain string replace only. base.html must use {{ content }} exclusively. All includes must be inlined into base.html. Never append serve command to build command.

rules: Master Report must be appended only - never delete fields
Single site build command for development, all sites for production only

changelog.change: Master Report auto-generated from real site structure by omni-builder AI assistant.
Engine fix: if __name__ == __main__ guard added to build_sites.py — import no longer triggers full loop across all sites.
base.html must use {{ content }} only — engine does plain string replace, no Jinja2, no {% %} tags supported.
Global components (header, cookie banner) must be inlined directly into theme/base.html — engine has no include system.
assets/ directory must be copied into build/ or served from project root — build/ directory only contains generated HTML.
Never append serve command to build command — if server already running on port 8000 it will throw OSError. Build only, then refresh browser.
Images migrated from Jekyll project to assets/images (30 files).
Migration confirmed complete. Jekyll _data files not required — all content rendered into pages.json. Images migrated.
Cookie banner inlined into base.html for all sites. Jekyll {% include %} tags removed and replaced with working inlined HTML.
CSS files migrated from Jekyll _site compiled output into assets/css/. Assets copied into build/. assets/ must be re-copied into build/ after every build.
Added known_issue: body_content must never contain full standalone HTML — double header/footer risk on all sites migrated from Jekyll.
Added known_issue: use Jekyll _site compiled output as body_content source of truth where available. Extract <main> only.

GitHub Actions deployment confirmed working for site_HCR. SSH key stored as SSH_PRIVATE_KEY secret. LFS enabled for pages.json. build.py in repo root. Workflow at .github/workflows/deploy.yml. Push to main triggers full build and rsync deploy to Plesk.
Deployment server and domain recorded: 217.154.45.205 / niddvalleybp.co.uk

Global lessons-learned patch applied: known_issues updated with homepage_slug, base_html_jekyll_tags, missing_js_assets and other engine/deploy rules. content_status and deployment_workflow stubs added where missing.
Global known_issues patch: head_styles_in_jekyll lesson added to all Master Reports.
Domain recorded from Jekyll _config.yml: https://niddvalleybp.co.uk
Live crawl from https://niddvalleybp.co.uk: 31 pages added, 0 updated. Top-level, service hubs, one example per service-location.
Bulk build: SKIPPED (no base.html). All 27 sites processed.
Created minimal base.html (no external CSS/JS, {{ content }} inside <main>).
Full bulk build of all 27 sites completed successfully. All sites now have a base.html template and build without errors.
Added GitHub Actions build-only workflow (no rsync). Created build.py and .gitattributes.
Initialized git repository locally, added .gitignore, created initial commit.
Pushed to GitHub: remote set to https://github.com/vswebsitedesign-ctrl/site_NV.git. GitHub Actions will now build on push.

AI safety governance block added: AI_READ_THIS_FIRST, session_workflow, recovery, ai_incident_log. Adapted from site_cic and site_tales proven session safety patterns. All rules, mandatory workflows, deploy commands, and emergency rollback procedures now documented as first-read entry point for every AI session.

Extracted and adapted best practices from site_tales Master Report: stop_protocol, error_recovery, key_lessons, hard_rules, session_scripts added. Four session scripts created: session_start.sh, snapshot.sh, restore.sh, session_end.sh. Version bumped to 1.1.0.

GSC audit completed via API. 23 clicks, 590 impressions, 90-day period. Key findings: mobile CTR 20.9% vs desktop 1.7% at pos 65.5; homepage carrying entire site; core service pages buried page 7-9 despite real impressions; house pointing pateley bridge on page 1 with 0 clicks. 8 action items logged GSC-P1-001 through GSC-P3-002, all PENDING.

Full GSC audit completed from all sources (API + 7 CSV files + screenshots). Key findings: 102 pages not indexed vs 33 indexed; 54 location pages crawled and rejected (thin content); 7 x 404s; 1 x noindex; 1 x 403; Elementor ghost page found; zero rich results/schema; two page 1 queries with zero clicks (spofforth pos 5.75, pateley bridge pos 10.19). 11 action items logged GSC2-P1-001 through GSC2-P3-003, all PENDING.

Full project filesystem audit completed. 15 bugs found (BUG-001 to BUG-015). Critical: wrong template token in base.html (site building with no content), hardcoded title tag Nv on all pages, zero meta descriptions, blank homepage slug, no CSS, no sitemap, no robots.txt. All bugs logged PENDING.

Git audit completed. 5 issues found (GIT-001 to GIT-005). Critical: key.json not in .gitignore. High: Zone.Identifier not ignored, session scripts untracked, Master_Report.json uncommitted. All logged PENDING.

Live site audit completed. Key finding: live site is original Jekyll site — omni-builder never deployed. CSS missing on ALL pages. 2 critical 404s found on pages with active GSC rankings (/types-of-pointing-services/ pos 14.17, /repointing-brickwork-stonework-harrogate/ pos 31). 5 action items logged LIVE-P1-001 through LIVE-P2-002.

Session continued: BUG-001, BUG-002, BUG-004, BUG-005, BUG-007, BUG-008 RESOLVED and verified by rebuilt output on disk. BUG-003 PARTIALLY_RESOLVED — injection mechanism working, actual meta description text for 31 pages still pending as separate content task. New bug BUG-016 found and fixed within same session: canonical_url fallback mishandled the non-empty "index" homepage slug, causing /index/ to appear as canonical and in sitemap.xml instead of root URL — corrected and reverified. All fixes snapshotted individually before editing (before-homepage-slug-fix-BUG-004-005, before-sitemap-robots-BUG-007-008, before-canonical-index-fix) and confirmed via rebuilt output, not assumption.

Location page generator built. data/locations.json created with 108 location records (107 pulled from live server + Harrogate added as new). theme/location.html created as single location template with 11 tokens. build.py patched to generate all 108 location pages from locations.json at build time. 25 location page HTML blobs removed from pages.json — pages.json now contains only 6 non-location pages. Full rebuild confirmed: 108 location pages + 6 pages = 114 URLs in sitemap, zero unreplaced tokens across entire build.
BUG-009 RESOLVED: send.php retrieved from live Jekyll server, saved to project root, build.py patched to copy send.php into build/ on every build. Verified in build output.

LIVE-P1-001 RESOLVED locally: types-of-pointing-services page created fresh (content gone from all sources), added to data/pages.json as 7th page entry with full inline-styled body_content, title, og_title, meta_description. Built and verified — zero unreplaced tokens, correct title tag.

GIT-001/002/004 RESOLVED: key.json and *.Identifier added to .gitignore, key.json removed from git cache. All core project files committed and pushed to GitHub — locations.json, location.html, build.py, base.html, pages.json, Master_Report.json. LFS objects uploaded successfully.

CSS rebuilt from scratch as clean omni-builder CSS — no Jekyll dependency. All 39 classes used in homepage body_content now defined in base.html. Snapshot taken before change. Build verified clean at 115 URLs.

og:image SERP thumbnail added: 1200x630 JPG generated from Nidd-Valley-Building-Preservation-7-1.webp, saved to assets/images/og-image.jpg. og:image, og:image:width, og:image:height, twitter:image and max-image-preview:large all wired into base.html.

LocalBusiness schema added to base.html alongside existing WebPage schema. Type set to [LocalBusiness, HomeAndConstructionBusiness]. Full address (Cold Bath Road, Harrogate, HG2 0NF), phone, email, opening hours, 9-service OfferCatalog, GeoCircle serviceArea, knowsAbout, foundingDate, numberOfEmployees, paymentAccepted all included.

SERVICE HUB PAGES: 8 missing service hub pages created and added to data/pages.json — repointing, stonework-restoration, chimney-repairs, wall-restoration-cleaning, damp-weather-damage, pointing-styles, mortar-lime-work, commercial-specialist. All with unique title, og_title, meta_description and full body_content using omni-builder inline CSS classes. Total pages now 15.

CSS EXTENDED: extra CSS classes added to base.html to support service hub page layouts — intro-strip, intro-grid, intro-img, intro-badges, badge, stats-bar, stats-grid, stat-item, stat-number, stat-label, bubbles-section, bubbles-grid, bubble, bubble-icon, content-section, content-grid, content-img, img-tag, btn-gold, cta-banner, cta-btns, process-section, steps-grid, step, step-number, locations-section, location-pill. All responsive breakpoints included.
Master Report status fields updated: all GIT issues resolved, all LIVE-P1/P2 issues resolved locally, stray_files cleared, favicon status corrected. Build clean at 123 URLs. Ready to deploy.
GIT-005 RESOLVED: session_start.sh run at start of session — branch session-2026-06-27-0810 created. Session branching workflow now active.
DEPLOYED: omni-builder deployed live for the first time via rsync to root@217.154.45.205. Jekyll replaced. 7.7MB transferred. All 123 URLs live and returning 200.
LIVE VERIFIED: homepage, types-of-pointing-services, repointing-brickwork-stonework-harrogate, repointing, chimney-repairs, sitemap.xml all returning 200 on live server.
SITEMAP SUBMITTED: https://niddvalleybp.co.uk/sitemap.xml submitted to Google Search Console. 123 URLs queued for crawl.
Next session reminder added: check GSC around 2026-07-18 for ranking movement after first omni-builder deploy. See next_session field for full checklist.

known_issues.template_tags_in_base: base.html may contain {% %} or {{ title }} tags the engine cannot process — use {{ content }} only
known_issues.includes_not_rendered: engine has no include system — all global components must be inlined into base.html
known_issues.assets_not_in_build: assets/ directory is not copied to build/ automatically — serve from project root or copy manually
known_issues.port_clash: always check port 8000 is free before serving — build only and refresh if server already running
known_issues.assets_build_sync: assets/ must be re-copied into build/ after every build — cp -r assets/ build/assets/ from each site root
known_issues.body_content_full_html: body_content must never contain full standalone HTML documents (no <!DOCTYPE>, <html>, <head>, <body> tags). Strip to <main> contents only. Full documents cause double header/footer when wrapped by base.html. Fix: re.search(r"<main[^>]*>(.*?)</main>", body, re.DOTALL)
known_issues.jekyll_site_source_of_truth: Where a matching Jekyll source exists at /home/chubert/<PROJECT>/_site/, use compiled _site HTML as body_content source of truth. Extract <main> contents only. Never use AI-rewritten content when compiled source exists.
known_issues.github_secret_name: GitHub secret MUST be named SSH_PRIVATE_KEY — workflow references secrets.SSH_PRIVATE_KEY. Any other name causes Permission denied on rsync.
known_issues.lfs_checkout: pages.json tracked via Git LFS — workflow checkout must include lfs: true or build fails with empty JSON error.
known_issues.build_script: build.py must exist in repo root — GitHub Actions runner calls python3 build.py directly.
known_issues.yaml_multiline: Never embed multiline Python in deploy.yml — always use a separate build.py script to avoid YAML syntax errors.
known_issues.homepage_slug: Engine builds index slug as build/index/index.html — must be manually copied to build/index.html after every build: cp build/index/index.html build/index.html
known_issues.base_html_jekyll_tags: base.html may contain Jekyll tags (site.baseurl, site.title, prepend filters, block/endblock) the engine cannot process — audit base.html before first build and replace all with plain values or {{ content }}
known_issues.missing_js_assets: cookieconsent.umd.js and cookie-init.js may be referenced in base.html but not exist in assets/js/ — check and remove missing JS references from base.html
known_issues.head_styles_in_jekyll: Some Jekyll pages store CSS in <head> <style> blocks — extractor must pull <style> block from <head> AND prepend to body content. Affects pages using custom layouts without <main> tags.

migration.reason: All Jekyll _data, _layouts, _includes content already rendered into data/pages.json body_content fields.

deployment_workflow.github_actions_status: build-only workflow – ready, runs on push
deployment_workflow.notes: Deployment to Plesk not configured; artifact uploads build/
deployment_workflow.deploy_status: PENDING — no IP or deploy user set in workflow
deployment_workflow.recommended_method: GitHub Actions + rsync over SSH as Plesk domain system user (not root) — see site_JKRS deploy.yml as reference implementation

mandatory_session_workflow: 1. READ this Master Report in full before any action
2. bash snapshot.sh "label" — run before EVERY risky change
3. bash restore.sh snapshots/X — instant restore if anything breaks
4. Commit and push only after local build verified clean
AI_READ_THIS_FIRST.emergency_rollback: git checkout main && git reset --hard HEAD~1
AI_READ_THIS_FIRST.deploy_command: SERVER NOT YET CONFIGURED — do not deploy
AI_READ_THIS_FIRST.github_actions: build-only — NO rsync in deploy.yml — all deploys are manual rsync from local machine
ai_rules: NEVER modify files inside ./build/ — fully overwritten on every build
NEVER rewrite build.py from scratch — targeted edits only
NEVER run sed/perl/regex on build/ files
NEVER commit directly to main without human confirmation
NEVER guess paths or filenames — read Master Report first
NEVER deploy via GitHub Actions rsync — manual rsync only
NEVER leave send.php redirecting anywhere other than /thank-you/
NEVER delete fields from Master Report — append only
ALWAYS read Master Report in full before any bash command
ALWAYS snapshot before every risky change
ALWAYS verify changes with a read-back command before building
ALWAYS batch fact-finding commands into a single paste
ALWAYS confirm best practice and no guessing with every command
Content changes go in data/pages.json only
Layout changes go in theme/base.html only if unavoidable
build.py must generate robots.txt and sitemap.xml on every build
Homepage slug rule: after every build copy build/{homepage_slug}/index.html to build/index.html

session_workflow.description: Mandatory workflow for every AI session
session_workflow.before_any_work: Read Master_Report.json in full — no exceptions
session_workflow.before_risky_change: bash snapshot.sh "description" — snapshots all critical files
session_workflow.restore_from_snapshot: bash restore.sh snapshots/TIMESTAMP_label — restores all critical files
session_workflow.session_end: Commit with descriptive message, push to GitHub, update Master Report changelog
session_workflow.emergency_rollback: git checkout main && git reset --hard HEAD~1
ai_mandatory_rules: Read Master Report before any work begins
Never commit directly to main during a session without human confirmation
Never make changes without telling the human exactly what will change first
Never run sed, perl, or regex on build/ files
Never rewrite build.py — targeted edits only
Never guess — always verify from disk
Batch all fact-finding into single commands
mandatory_session_workflow: 1. bash session_start.sh — creates git branch, protects main
2. bash snapshot.sh "label" — run before EVERY risky change
3. bash restore.sh snapshots/X — instant restore if anything breaks
4. bash session_end.sh "msg" — merge to main, push, clean snapshots

recovery.description: Full site recovery from scratch — two commands only
recovery.note: All assets, content, and build logic are in the repo. pages.json tracked via Git LFS — ensure lfs: true on checkout.

ai_incident_log.description: Permanent log of AI errors on this project — read before every session
ai_incident_log.permanent_fix: AI must read this entire Master Report before generating any bash commands. No assumptions. No guessing. Verify everything from disk.

stop_protocol.action: halt immediately — no continuation, no suggestions — wait

error_recovery.if_destructive: show verification command first, then execute

key_lessons: Always read uploaded files immediately — never ask what is in them
Never give deployment instructions without reading the project report first
Never use sed for replacements with special characters — always Python
Always verify output after every change — build success alone is not sufficient
Never repeat a failed approach — change method immediately
If broken: REBUILD immediately — no debugging loops
One command at a time — wait for confirmation before the next
NEVER use rsync --delete on this project
NEVER commit directly to main during a session
hard_rules: Never guess paths — read Master Report first
Never use GitHub Actions to deploy to Plesk
Never deploy without checking build output first
NEVER use rsync --delete on this project
NEVER use sed on files with special characters — use Python
Master Report must be appended only — never delete fields
ALWAYS snapshot before any risky change

session_scripts.session_start: bash session_start.sh — run before any work, creates dated git branch
session_scripts.snapshot: bash snapshot.sh "label" — snapshots build.py, theme/base.html, data/pages.json, Master_Report.json, assets/images/
session_scripts.restore: bash restore.sh snapshots/TIMESTAMP_label — restores all critical files instantly
session_scripts.session_end: bash session_end.sh "msg" — commits, merges to main, pushes, cleans snapshots

finding_1_mobile_vs_desktop.summary: Mobile converting at 20.9% CTR (pos 20.1) — desktop buried at pos 65.5 with 1.7% CTR despite 523 impressions
finding_1_mobile_vs_desktop.conclusion: Mobile experience working. Desktop is the core problem — pages lack content depth Google rewards on desktop.

finding_2_homepage_carrying_site.summary: 15 of 23 clicks came from homepage. Every service and location page is effectively invisible.
finding_2_homepage_carrying_site.conclusion: Homepage is the only real performer. Service and location pages are not pulling traffic.

finding_3_service_pages_buried.summary: Core service pages getting impressions but ranking page 7-9. Thin content problem, not a crawl/index problem.
finding_3_service_pages_buried.conclusion: All core service pages need substantially more content to move off page 7-9.

project_audit_2026_06_27.method: Full filesystem audit — find, pages.json parse, base.html read, build.py read, assets find

BUG-001.issue: base.html uses wrong template token { content } — build.py replaces {{ content }}. These do not match. Every page builds with no content injected.
BUG-001.fix: Change { content } to {{ content }} in theme/base.html
BUG-001.resolved_evidence: base.html token corrected to {{ content }}; build.py verified injecting content correctly across all 31 pages, zero unreplaced tokens found in full build/ scan

BUG-002.issue: base.html title hardcoded as <title>Nv</title> — every page on the site has identical title tag. Zero SEO value. Explains zero-click page 1 rankings.
BUG-002.fix: Make title dynamic — inject per-page title from pages.json via build.py
BUG-002.resolved_evidence: build.py now injects per-page title via {{ title }} token with fallback; verified on rebuilt pateley-bridge page showing correct dynamic title

BUG-003.issue: Zero meta descriptions across all 32 pages. Google generating its own snippets. No meta_description field being injected by build.py.
BUG-003.fix: Add meta_description field to all pages in pages.json, inject via build.py and base.html
BUG-003.resolved_evidence: Mechanism only: meta_description field, build.py injection, and base.html token all wired and verified working with empty-string fallback. Actual description TEXT for all 31 pages still not written — content task remains PENDING separately from this code fix.

BUG-004.issue: Homepage slug is empty string with 0 words and no title — blank page being built to build/index.html
BUG-004.fix: Remove blank slug entry or populate with homepage content
BUG-004.resolved_evidence: Blank slug entry removed from pages.json (32 -> 31 pages, 0 blank slugs remaining, verified by direct parse)

BUG-005.issue: Slug conflict — empty slug AND index slug both resolve near build/index.html
BUG-005.fix: Remove empty slug page, keep index slug as homepage
BUG-005.resolved_evidence: build.py now auto-copies build/index/index.html to build/index.html on every build; word counts verified matching (6110 words each)

BUG-006.issue: No CSS anywhere in project — assets/ contains only images. Site renders as completely unstyled bare HTML.
BUG-006.fix: Create assets/css/style.css and link in base.html

BUG-007.issue: No sitemap.xml being generated by build.py. Master Report ai_rules require sitemap on every build.
BUG-007.resolved_evidence: sitemap.xml now generated on every build from same canonical_url values used for page output; verified 31 URLs present, root URL correct after canonical fix

BUG-008.issue: No robots.txt being generated by build.py. Master Report ai_rules require robots.txt on every build.
BUG-008.resolved_evidence: robots.txt now generated on every build referencing sitemap.xml; verified content on disk

BUG-009.issue: No send.php in project. Contact page form submissions go nowhere.
BUG-009.fix: Create send.php and wire into build.py to copy to build/

BUG-010.issue: base.html has no navigation, no header, no footer, no logo. Site is bare unstyled content only.
BUG-010.fix: Build full base.html with nav, header, footer, logo

BUG-011.fix: Create SVG favicon and wire into base.html and build.py

BUG-012.issue: gsc-extract-500704-e8f4e0aaccac.json:Zone.Identifier Windows artifact in project root — should not be in repo

BUG-013.issue: key.json (GSC API key) sitting in project root — must not be committed to git

BUG-014.issue: Loose index.html in project root — not inside build/, purpose unclear
BUG-014.fix: Investigate and remove if not needed

BUG-015.issue: Only 32 pages in pages.json vs 135 pages known to GSC. Remaining location pages are leftover from old Jekyll installation still being served live.
BUG-015.note: Jekyll pages being served from live server are not under omni-builder control — they will be replaced as new pages are built and deployed

BUG-016.issue: Introduced during BUG-007/008 work: canonical_url fallback logic only special-cased empty slug as homepage root, not the actual non-empty "index" slug used by the real homepage record. Result: both build/index.html and build/index/index.html rendered canonical tag as https://niddvalleybp.co.uk/index/ instead of root, and sitemap.xml listed /index/ instead of /. Caught by manual verification before deployment, not by automated test.
BUG-016.fix: canonical_url fallback changed to treat slug in ('', 'index') as root URL, matching the same special-case already used for the homepage file-copy logic
BUG-016.resolved_evidence: Rebuilt and verified: both canonical tags now show https://niddvalleybp.co.uk/, sitemap.xml contains root URL with no /index/ entry, URL count held steady at 31
